title: RERA Compliance Page
intro: At Zar Ventures, we are committed to conducting all real estate advisory and facilitation activities in full compliance with the Real Estate (Regulation and Development) Act, 2016 (RERA) and applicable state rules in India. This policy outlines our approach to transparency, accountability, and customer protection in alignment with RERA guidelines.

sections.title: Purpose of the RERA Compliance Policy
sections.content: The purpose of this policy is to:
items: Ensure transparency and fairness in real estate transactions
Protect the interests of buyers, sellers, and investors
Promote ethical business practices
Comply with all statutory obligations under RERA

sections.title: Scope
items: All residential and commercial property transactions in India facilitated by Zar Venture Real Estate
All employees, consultants, channel partners, and representatives acting on behalf of the company
Marketing, sales, and advisory activities related to RERA-regulated projects

sections.title: RERA Registration & Project Verification
sections.content: Zar Venture Real Estate ensures that:
items: Only RERA-registered projects are promoted, marketed, or facilitated where RERA registration is mandatory
Valid RERA registration numbers are verified on the respective State RERA authority websites
RERA registration details are clearly disclosed to clients in marketing material and communications

sections.title: Transparency in Information Disclosure
sections.content: We are committed to providing accurate and verified information, including:
items: Project approvals, layouts, specifications, and amenities
Carpet area, possession timelines, and pricing details
Applicable charges, taxes, and statutory fees
sections.additionalContent: All representations made are based on information provided by developers and verified through publicly available RERA records wherever applicable.

sections.title: Ethical Marketing Practices
sections.content: Zar Venture Real Estate follows ethical marketing standards by:
items: Avoiding misleading advertisements or false promises
Clearly stating that visuals, brochures, and sample flats are indicative
Not guaranteeing possession dates, returns, or appreciation unless contractually committed by the developer

sections.title: Client Rights & Grievance Awareness
sections.content: We ensure that clients are informed about:
items: Their rights under RERA, including timely possession and defect liability
Available remedies and grievance redressal mechanisms under State RERA authorities
The importance of reviewing the Agreement for Sale registered under RERA

sections.title: No Guarantee of Returns
sections.content: In line with RERA and applicable laws:
items: We do not promise or guarantee rental income, appreciation, or assured returns
All investment-related projections are indicative and market-based

sections.title: Documentation & Record Maintenance
items: Proper records of client communications and transactions
Copies of RERA registration details and project disclosures
Documentation support in coordination with developers and legal professionals

sections.title: Training & Awareness
items: Is trained on RERA provisions and compliance requirements
Follows standardized processes aligned with regulatory expectations
Acts in the best interest of clients with integrity and professionalism

sections.title: Updates to the Policy
sections.content: This RERA Compliance Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in laws, regulations, or business practices. The updated policy will be made available on our website.
